title: R.E.P.O Cosmetic Hats
description: 16 Cosmetic hats created in theme with the R.E.P.O (REPO) Game :D
body:
![Project Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb777380be9a06208c0f4b5c24e2976426487564_0.webp)
-
R.E.P.O Cosmetic Hats resource pack adds **16x Cosmetic Hats** _(8x with Crowns, 8x without Crowns)_ with multiple colour options!

# How To Use:

- Download the resource pack, and add it to your Packs folder.
- You will need to use a command to get the hats. All are listed below;
<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>
  To give yourself the actual item:
  
**/give <username> minecraft:paper[minecraft:custom_model_data=<model_data_number>**


To put the item onto your head slot directly:

**/item replace entity <username> armor.head with paper[minecraft:custom_model_data=<model_data_number>**

Model Data is listed in the next Spoiler column.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom Model Data Numbers</summary>

Format: <Colour> [<NoCrown>/<Crown>]

- Black [10042/10043]

- Blue [10044/10045]

- Green [10046/10047]

- Pink [10048/10049]

- Purple [10050/10051]

- Red [10052/10053]

- White [10054/10055]

- Yellow [10056/10057]



</details>

Need help, or have any questions? Join our [Discord ](https://discord.gg/QFt3sVwCYw)!
![crabbycovediscord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a1d86b6a85e4bb04f2d8ef2743a417561d2e67_0.webp)
